details.test: Task 1: Configure neuroscience fluorescence microscope and add to quote
Task 2: Select higher-frame-rate surgical endoscopy camera under 18000 and add to cart
Task 3: Download cardiology OCT whitepaper published in 2023 or later
Task 4: Add three compatible objective lenses for ApexLab MX500 to cart
Task 5: Find German surgical imaging distributor in Berlin and copy phone number
Task 6: Request virtual demo for Retinal OCT System XR-300 on specific date/time
Task 7: Build custom cellular imaging bundle under 12000 and add to quote
Task 8: Save troubleshooting article about image noise on MX500 confocal to favorites
Task 9: Register for Introduction to Fluorescence Microscopy webinar at specific session time
